metadata.name: Wyoming Entity Details
metadata.description: Extract entity details from Wyoming business filing details page

actions.description: Solve CAPTCHA if present (retry up to 3 times)

condition.text: What code is in the image?

actions.javascript: async () => { const images = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('img')); let best = null; let bestArea = 0; for (const img of images) { const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect(); const area = rect.width * rect.height; if (area > 6000 && area > bestArea && img.offsetParent !== null) { best = img; bestArea = area; } } if (!best) return null; const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = best.naturalWidth || best.width; canvas.height = best.naturalHeight || best.height; const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.drawImage(best, 0, 0); const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); return dataUrl; }

actions.description: Extract entity detail block — Name, FilingId, Type, Status, SubStatus, InitialFilingDate, standings, InactiveDate, TermOfDuration, FormedIn, addresses, RA, additional details
actions.javascript: () => { const t = (id) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); return el ? (el.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; }; const n = (v) => v || null; return JSON.stringify({ name: t('txtFilingName') || t('txtFilingName2'), status: t('txtStatus'), formationDate: t('txtInitialDate'), idNumber: t('txtFilingNum'), form: t('txtFilingType'), periodicReportMonth: null, jurisdiction: t('txtFormation'), principalOfficeStreetAddress: n(t('txtOfficeAddresss')), principalOfficeMailingAddress: n(t('txtMailAddress')), subStatus: n(t('txtSubStatus')), standingTax: n(t('txtStanding')), standingRA: n(t('txtStandingRA')), standingOther: n(t('txtStandingOther')), inactiveDate: n(t('txtInactiveDate')), termOfDuration: n(t('txtDuration')), formedIn: n(t('txtFormation')), latestAnnualReportYear: n(t('txtLatestAR')), annualReportExempt: n(t('txtARExempt')), licenseTaxPaid: n(t('txtTaxPaid')) }); }

actions.description: Extract registered agent name and address
actions.javascript: () => { const t = (id) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); return el ? (el.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; }; const name = t('txtAgentName'); if (!name) return null; return JSON.stringify({ name: name || null, streetAddress: t('txtAgentAddress') || null, mailingAddress: null }); }

() => { const container = document.getElementById('divParties'); if (!container) return JSON.stringify([]); const text = (container.textContent || '').trim(); if (text.includes('None Currently Assigned')) return JSON.stringify([]); const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const parties = []; const entries = container.querySelectorAll('div.row, div[class*="party"], div[class*="Party"], li, tr'); for (const entry of entries) { const fullText = normalize(entry.textContent); if (fullText.length < 3) continue; const roleMatch = fullText.match(/\(([^)]+)\)/); const role = roleMatch ? roleMatch[1] : 'Unknown'; let name = fullText.replace(/\([^)]+\)/, '').split(/Organization:|Address:/)[0]; let org = null; let addr = null; if (fullText.includes('Organization:')) { org = fullText.split('Organization:')[1].split('Address:')[0]; } if (fullText.includes('Address:')) { addr = fullText.split('Address:').pop(); } if (normalize(name).length > 0) { parties.push({ name: normalize(name), role: normalize(role), organization: org ? normalize(org) : null, address: addr ? normalize(addr) : null }); } } return JSON.stringify(parties); }

actions.description: Extract idNumber into top-level variable for certificate lookup
Extract history documents from divHistorySummary (all documents with PDF icons)
actions.javascript: () => { const container = document.getElementById('divHistorySummary'); if (!container) return JSON.stringify([]); const sections = container.querySelectorAll('section.row-fluid'); const docs = []; for (const section of sections) { const icon = section.querySelector('i.fhPdf.fh_On'); if (!icon) continue; const onclick = icon.getAttribute('onclick') || ''; const m = onclick.match(/GetImages\("([^"]+)",\s*"([^"]+)"\)/); if (!m) continue; const refDiv = section.querySelector('.fhRef'); const dateDiv = section.querySelector('.fhDate'); const title = refDiv ? refDiv.textContent.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim() : ''; const dateMatch = dateDiv ? dateDiv.textContent.match(/(\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{4})/) : null; const date = dateMatch ? dateMatch[1] : ''; const storageUrl = 'https://wyobiz.wyo.gov/Business/GetImages.aspx?sid=' + m[1] + '&stid=' + m[2]; const slug = title.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '').toLowerCase(); docs.push({ eventTitle: title, date: date, storageUrl: storageUrl, fileName: slug + '.pdf', error: null }); } return JSON.stringify(docs); }

actions.description: Enter filing ID on certificate page
Check certificate eligibility — detect ineligibility alert
actions.javascript: () => { const text = document.body.innerText || ''; if (text.includes('Certificates may only be printed when the entity Standing')) { return 'Entity is not in good standing. Certificates may only be printed when the entity Standing is Good.'; } return ''; }

actions.description: Screenshot ineligibility alert state (when Print button absent)
Download WY certificate PDF from Print button
